name: @contentful/skill-kit
description: TypeScript SDK for building agent skills with CLI-driven workflows

scripts.build:examples: pnpm run build:examples:get-to-know-you && pnpm run build:examples:ts-patterns && pnpm run build:examples:contentful-help && pnpm run build:examples:game-jam && pnpm run build:examples:primitives-showcase
scripts.build:examples:get-to-know-you: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/get-to-know-you/src/skill.ts -o examples/get-to-know-you/skill --mode node
scripts.build:examples:ts-patterns: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/ts-patterns/src/skill.ts -o examples/ts-patterns/skill --mode node
scripts.build:examples:contentful-help: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/contentful-help/src/skill.ts -o examples/contentful-help/skill --mode node
scripts.build:examples:game-jam: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/game-jam/src/skill.ts -o examples/game-jam/skill --mode node
scripts.build:examples:primitives-showcase: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/primitives-showcase/src/skill.ts -o examples/primitives-showcase/skill --mode node
scripts.build:examples:bun: pnpm run build:examples:get-to-know-you:bun && pnpm run build:examples:ts-patterns:bun && pnpm run build:examples:contentful-help:bun && pnpm run build:examples:game-jam:bun && pnpm run build:examples:primitives-showcase:bun
scripts.build:examples:get-to-know-you:bun: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/get-to-know-you/src/skill.ts -o examples/get-to-know-you/skill
scripts.build:examples:ts-patterns:bun: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/ts-patterns/src/skill.ts -o examples/ts-patterns/skill
scripts.build:examples:contentful-help:bun: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/contentful-help/src/skill.ts -o examples/contentful-help/skill
scripts.build:examples:game-jam:bun: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/game-jam/src/skill.ts -o examples/game-jam/skill
scripts.build:examples:primitives-showcase:bun: node --import tsx/esm bin/skill-kit.js build examples/primitives-showcase/src/skill.ts -o examples/primitives-showcase/skill
